title: Wing-Blast rocket pack
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:EachSoldSeparately-SWI80.jpg|right|[[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett's]] Wing-Blast rocket pack.|thumb|247px]]
The '''Wing-Blast rocket pack''' was a deadly one-person weapons system utilized by the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorians]] similar to the [[Mandalorian battle harness/Legends|Mandalorian battle harness]].<ref name="History">{{InsiderCite|80|The History of the Mandalorians: Exploring the Evolution of a Mighty Race of Warriors}}</ref> It had two nearly vertical wings, each packed with miniature [[Concussion missile/Legends|concussion missile]] launchers inside and carrying a heavy rotating double [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]]. The pack also included a proton torpedo cannon, mounted over the head of the pack's user.<ref name="Action Figure pack">{{KennerCite|set=Star Wars: The Power of the Force (1995 toy line)|pack=Deluxe Boba Fett|link=POTF2dlxboba.asp}}</ref>

The pack was allegedly designed several hundred years [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]] by [[General/Legends|General]] [[Gustav Zenlav]], of the [[MandalMotors/Legends|MandalMotors]] corporation, and originally incorporated an experimental [[photonic beam]] where the proton torpedo cannon would eventually be mounted; the addition of the weapon caused Zenlav to shelve the design. Hundreds of years later, the blueprints for the pack fell into the possession of [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]]. Recognizing the promise of the design, Fett replaced the photonic beam with the proton torpedo system, and used the Wing-Blast rocket pack to storm [[Fortress Baarlos]], defeat the fortress's [[Tulvaree]] guardians, and collect the bounty on [[Faarl]] the Conqueror.<ref name="History" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Wing-Blast rocket pack first appeared in [[Hasbro]]'s ''[[Star Wars: The Power of the Force (1995 toy line)|Power of the Force]]'' action figure series, released in [[January]] [[1997]].<ref name="AFF">''[[Star Wars: The Action Figure Archive]]''</ref> Its history was expanded upon in [[Abel G. Peña]]'s article "[[The History of the Mandalorians: Exploring the Evolution of a Mighty Race of Warriors|The History of the Mandalorians]]."
